annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Wis. Stat. § 815.05(8), currently 7.75% (as of July 9, 2026). Annual rate = 1% + prime rate. Prime rate is the bank prime loan rate published by the Federal Reserve Board in statistical release H.15… Simple interest. § 815.05(8) governs POST-judgment interest (from date of entry until paid); prejudgment interest on the verdict/costs is under § 814.04(4), which… Verify the current value at docs.legis.wisconsin.gov; not legal advice.
